MESIRE Balloon Sinus Dilation System

MESIRE · Sinus Surgery

The MESIRE Balloon Sinus Dilation System is an advanced, minimally invasive surgical solution designed to open inflamed sinuses. It utilizes a precise, single-use flexible balloon catheter to reach inflamed sinuses and gently inflate to restructure previously blocked nasal passages without the removal of bone or tissue, preserving normal anatomy and mucosal tissue.

MaterialStainless Steel
Full Technical Matrix

MESIRE Balloon Sinus Dilation System

Technical Blueprint SpecificationClinical Value
Balloon Diameters
5 mm, 6 mm, 7 mm
Balloon Length
17 mm
Guide Catheter Distal Angles
0°, 30°, 70°, 90°, 110°
Light Wire Diameter
0.83 mm
Light Wire Length
100 cm

Balloon Compliance

Non-compliant

Balloon Design

Six-fold

Primary Material

Stainless Steel

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

Complete balloon sinus dilation system for minimally invasive treatment of chronic sinusitis. The system uses flexible balloon catheters to open inflamed sinuses without removing bone or tissue, preserving normal anatomy while providing effective symptom relief.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the MESIRE Balloon Sinus Dilation System, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The MESIRE Balloon Sinus Dilation System is constructed using Stainless Steel, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
